causal_events.theory_claim: The revised rate of volume expansion during up days (MECH_002) and absorption rate revision (MECH_003) jointly cause a stronger upward bias in price movements, leading to a neutral market regime chara
causal_events.attribution_reasoning:
The theory states that the revised rate of volume expansion during up days (MECH_002) and absorption rate revision (MECH_003) jointly cause a stronger upward bias in price movements, leading to a neutral market regime characterized by range-bound trading with increasing institutional buying.
